compute.cost_note: network-bound; one CSV fetch plus one HTML fetch per admitted report

do_not_use_when: the source is not the EveryCRSReport reports.csv index
purpose: pull Congressional Research Service reports from EveryCRSReport.com into the policy_brief impostor pool (the population baseline argmove_profile profiles).
use_when: building the policy_brief population baseline from public-domain CRS reports
